coarse_alignment_reason: Whole-poem fallback because Chinese and English stanza structures do not align safely.
chinese_text:
彼采葛兮，一日不見，如三月兮。
彼采蕭兮，一日不見，如三秋兮。
彼采艾兮，一日不見，如三歲兮。
translation_text:
1 There he is gathering the dolichos !
A day without seeing him
Is like three months !

2 There he is gathering the oxtail-southernwood !
A day without seeing him
Is like three seasons !

3 There he is gathering the mugwort !
A day without seeing him
Is like three years !
